channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Anthropic redeploys Claude Fable 5 on Amazon Bedrock ahead of API and Claude.ai rollouts
item.description: The model is available immediately for enterprise Bedrock customers.
item.content:encoded:
The model is available immediately for enterprise Bedrock customers.

Original source: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15424964-claude-fable-5-promotional-access

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/87t14h5u

After export controls briefly sidelined Claude Fable 5 just days after its June debut, Anthropic is flipping the switch back on for enterprise teams first through Amazon Bedrock, with the same top-tier Mythos-class capabilities now cleared for wider use once the compliance pause lifted. 6.5K 58.1K 2.4K 4.1K 3.7M TH #1985 | @VOOOOOOGEL LA #1787 | @LIORONAI SM #1714 | @SAMMCALLISTER ND #1657 | @NICKADOBOS CH #1364 | @KIMMONISMUS T- #1329 | @THEO LA #1218 | @SCALING01 PT #821 | @ELDER_PLINIUS DF #756 | @DANIELLEFONG RS #741 | @ZIV_RAVID EL #684 | @OMARSAR0 BT #593 | @TUNGUZ AA #479 | @ALEXALBERT__ RS #447 | @SCOBLEIZER

  • Views: 249,163
  • Likes: 3,598
  • Bookmarks: 178
  • Quotes: 11
  • Replies: 237
  • Posts: 18

Top authors

  • Robert Scoble
  • Alex Albert
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • elvis
  • Ravid Shwartz Ziv
Welcome back to the world Fable!!

item.title: Nikita Bier announces X Live Studio, a professional livestreaming command center with subscriber-only chat controls
item.description: The release will be paired with a new Livestream API.
item.content:encoded:
The release will be paired with a new Livestream API.

Original source: https://studio.x.com/live

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/pshgbev1

X is rolling out Live Studio as a desktop command center inside Creator Studio, letting pro streamers schedule events, upload thumbnails, gate audiences including subscriber-only chats, moderate live chat in real time, and track viewer metrics, with a demo featuring a scheduled rocket launch; the move also introduces an accompanying Livestream API and hints at a future $1 million creator rewards pool. 2K 6.7K 743 1K 765.9K AV #1423 | @ALTRYNE T- #1329 | @THEO RS #447 | @SCOBLEIZER NB #239 | @NIKITABIER

  • Views: 769,120
  • Likes: 6,439
  • Bookmarks: 1,033
  • Quotes: 538
  • Replies: 1,495
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • Nikita Bier
  • Robert Scoble
  • Theo - t3.gg
  • Alex Volkov @ AI Engineer
@chrisparkX Need chatterino support

item.title: OpenAI's Romain Huet showcases a joke physical 'Codex token reset device' at the aiDotEngineer conference
item.description: Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux also promoted the stunt.
item.content:encoded:
Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux also promoted the stunt.

Original source: https://x.com/dkundel/status/2072422693081940445

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gahp7h76

At the aiDotEngineer conference, OpenAI turned its booth into a playful stage by placing a small blue button inside a locked glass case, framed as the Codex token reset device and open for a one-time 1pm demonstration before heading back to storage. 579 7.5K 177 390 1.4M V( #1942 | @REACH_VB EL #684 | @OMARSAR0 RH #642 | @ROMAINHUET TI #611 | @THSOTTIAUX PS #382 | @STEIPETE S@ #225 | @SWYX GB #32 | @GDB

  • Views: 252,674
  • Likes: 2,271
  • Bookmarks: 122
  • Quotes: 24
  • Replies: 261
  • Posts: 11

Top authors

  • Greg Brockman
  • swyx @aiDotEngineer WF
  • Peter Steinberger 🦞
  • Tibo
  • Romain Huet
It's happening

item.title: Meta plans to launch a cloud service selling excess AI compute capacity and hosted models to offset infrastructure costs
item.description: The service will compete with AWS Bedrock and CoreWeave.
item.content:encoded:
The service will compete with AWS Bedrock and CoreWeave.

Original source: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-01/meta-is-building-a-cloud-business-to-sell-excess-ai-compute

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gypsshy5

Meta's CEO floated the idea of renting out extra AI GPUs as a backup plan during a May shareholder meeting, but only if the company's massive data-center buildout ends up exceeding its own needs. No engineering work, pricing, or launch timeline has been confirmed, leaving the idea as strategic optionality rather than an active project. 181 3K 92 222 589.7K DM #1770 | @DAVEMCCLURE ZE #1700 | @ZEPHYR_Z9 CH #1364 | @KIMMONISMUS LA #1218 | @SCALING01 GM #178 | @GARYMARCUS

  • Views: 590,569
  • Likes: 3,071
  • Bookmarks: 219
  • Quotes: 17
  • Replies: 156
  • Posts: 12

Top authors

  • Gary Marcus
  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Chubby♨️
  • Zephyr
  • Dave McClure
@zephyr_z9 @evrgn11112231 First poly market business, now this…

item.title: Anthropic launches one-week Claude Fable 5 trial for Pro, Team, and Enterprise subscribers
item.description: The promotional model trial runs until July 7.
item.content:encoded:
The promotional model trial runs until July 7.

Original source: https://x.com/nathanbenaich/status/2072403895997825496/photo/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/i217ig5t

Anthropic is giving Pro, Team, and premium Enterprise subscribers a short window to test Claude Fable 5 across its main platforms, with the offer running only through July 7 at no added cost. 1.2K 12.2K 172 450 550K RP #1260 | @ROHANPAUL_AI SM #1228 | @PITDESI JW #710 | @WOLFEJOSH AC #682 | @ANDREWCURRAN_ @L #627 | @LEVELSIO NB #353 | @NATHANBENAICH

  • Views: 70,797
  • Likes: 1,036
  • Bookmarks: 44
  • Quotes: 7
  • Replies: 69
  • Posts: 7

Top authors

  • Nathan Benaich
  • @levelsio
  • Andrew Curran
  • Josh Wolfe
  • Sheel Mohnot
Omg

item.title: UC Berkeley EECS department chair Jelani Nelson joins Anthropic while on leave of absence
item.description: Nelson specializes in algorithms for massive datasets.
item.content:encoded:
Nelson specializes in algorithms for massive datasets.

Original source: https://x.com/netcapgirl/status/2072434231259844694

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/1r7064v5

UC Berkeley's computer science division chair Jelani Nelson has started a leave of absence to join Anthropic as Member of Technical Staff on July 1, 2026, shifting his focus from teaching combinatorial algorithms and sketching methods to applying those techniques inside a frontier AI lab. 505 7.6K 216 970 3.2M JL #907 | @JERRYJLIU0 DF #756 | @DANIELLEFONG AC #682 | @ANDREWCURRAN_ B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS PM #317 | @DOCMILANFAR DP #179 | @PFAU

  • Views: 34,536
  • Likes: 261
  • Bookmarks: 14
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 14
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • David Pfau
  • Peyman Milanfar
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Andrew Curran
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
imagine being a berkeley eecs undergrad opening piazza and the pinned post says your department chair has been acquired by claude

item.title: Founder @levelsio warns the EU's new sub-€150 customs duty will trigger severe shipping delays and complex tax burdens
item.description: Recipients must manually classify imports using complex tariff codes.
item.content:encoded:
Recipients must manually classify imports using complex tariff codes.

Original source: https://x.com/vonderleyen/status/2072222371461705796

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/3v4ejtj6

The EU ends its €150 de minimis exemption on 1 July 2026, replacing it with a temporary €3 flat customs fee per tariff line on low-value distance sales until mid-2028, after which normal product-specific tariffs kick in. A Portugal-based founder has flagged potential weeks-long delays, broken portals, and confusing classifications for recipients, yet official guidance stresses a simplified transitional regime handled mainly by carriers and platforms. 7.1K 12.1K 1K 2.3K 5.4M PS #1362 | @PETESKOMOROCH @L #627 | @LEVELSIO RP #395 | @TYPESFAST

  • Views: 740,997
  • Likes: 7,895
  • Bookmarks: 955
  • Quotes: 130
  • Replies: 110
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Ryan Petersen
  • @levelsio
  • Pete Skomoroch
$3b

item.title: Weaver Robotics launches Isaac 1, a household chore robot shipping this fall
item.description: Online orders are open alongside a promotional capability video.
item.content:encoded:
Online orders are open alongside a promotional capability video.

Original source: https://x.com/weaverobotics/status/2072362538671706314

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/ewunnqxu

Weaver Robotics, the YC S24 startup, is opening pre-orders for its wheeled Isaac 1 robot that tackles laundry pickup and folding plus daily tidying of beds, toys, and clutter, with the first customer shipments slated for fall 2026 beginning in California. 1.8K 10.2K 217 3.8K 6.5M B( #1627 | @ANDERSONBCDEFG AL #1156 | @ALTH0U CP #856 | @CHRIS_J_PAXTON

  • Views: 1,011,579
  • Likes: 2,725
  • Bookmarks: 615
  • Quotes: 12
  • Replies: 123
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Chris Paxton
  • alth0u🧶
  • Ben (no treats)
$$8k home robot. Closer and closer to never doing chores again

item.title: Epic Games founder Tim Sweeney shares screenshot of Anthropic's Claude safety filter blocking a query about bumblebee flatulence
item.description: The safety block forced a model switch to Opus 4.8
item.content:encoded:
The safety block forced a model switch to Opus 4.8

Original source: https://x.com/TimSweeneyEpic/status/2072405899260448997

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/7yl7cme8

Epic Games founder Tim Sweeney posted a screenshot showing Anthropic's Claude interface blocking the query "Do bumblebees fart?" with a message about safety measures flagging even safe conversations. The exchange occurred with the newly launched Fable 5 model, whose classifiers routed the prompt onward rather than refusing it outright. 252 4K 196 185 197.8K TS #1051 | @TIMSWEENEYEPIC DF #756 | @DANIELLEFONG LB #72 | @GIFFMANA

  • Views: 201,100
  • Likes: 4,101
  • Bookmarks: 188
  • Quotes: 57
  • Replies: 198
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
  • Tim Sweeney
@TimSweeneyEpic “Sir, they know about the Bumblebee farts.”

item.title: BPI report says a China-linked activist group blocked or delayed $23.6 billion in US AI infrastructure projects
item.description: The campaigns triggered ten US data center moratoria.
item.content:encoded:
The campaigns triggered ten US data center moratoria.

Original source: https://www.btcpolicy.org/articles/foreign-influence-campaign-against-american-ai-part-ii-singham-ground-game

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/6ntxbmwz

A BPI investigation traces how the Party for Socialism and Liberation helped organize local opposition that contributed to ten data-center moratoria and roughly $23.6 billion in delayed or canceled AI infrastructure across 14 states, with documented wins in nine of them. 470 6.1K 1.1K 2K 1.2M BO #832 | @BODONOGHUE85 B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS GT #121 | @GARRYTAN

  • Views: 27,764
  • Likes: 548
  • Bookmarks: 47
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 28
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Garry Tan
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Brendan O'Donoghue
Read the full report here 👇 https://www.btcpolicy.org/articles/foreign-influence-campaign-against-american-ai-part-ii-singham-ground-game
